prompt: write my self-review. i mostly work in python and my main repos are on github under my personal account and two orgs. want to understand what themes emerge from my code this year
assertions: Skill triggers correctly on casual phrasing 'write my self-review'
Report groups contributions by theme rather than just listing repos alphabetically
Report identifies narrative themes across repos
Self-Assessment Prompts section is present with relevant questions
Report reads as a narrative document not a commit log
